title: Je tï؟½adore ï؟½ lï؟½ï؟½gal de la voï؟½te nocturne
content:
آ آ آ آ I adore you, the nocturnal vaultï؟½s likeness,
آ آ آ آ o vast taciturnity, o vase of sadness:
آ آ آ آ I love you, my beauty, the more you flee,
آ آ آ آ grace of my nights, the more you seem,
آ آ آ آ to multiply distances, ah ironically,
آ آ آ آ that bar my arms from the blue immensity.

آ آ آ آ I advance to the attack, climb to the assault
آ آ آ آ like a swarm of worms attacking a corpse,
آ آ آ آ and I cherish, o creature cruel, and implacable,
آ آ آ آ your coldness that makes you, for me, more beautiful!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Charles Baudelaire delivers a powerful performance in "Je tï؟½adore ï؟½ lï؟½ï؟½gal de la voï؟½te nocturne"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
